hero.eyebrow: Founded in memory of a maestro
hero.title: Music lives in those who share it
hero.subtitle: Fundación Pipo Navarro preserves Panama's musical legacy by donating instruments and promoting music education across Panama.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Bringing music to those who need it most.
mission.card1_text: We accept musical instrument donations from individuals and institutions to give them a second life.
mission.card2_text: We participate in cultural events that celebrate and spread Panamanian music.
mission.card3_text: We preserve the memory of Pipo Navarro, a Panamanian musician whose passion inspires our work.

donate.title: Donate an Instrument
donate.subtitle: An instrument you no longer use can change a child's life.
donate.step1_text: Write or call us to coordinate the donation.
donate.step2_text: We arrange collection at a convenient location.
donate.step3_text: The instrument reaches the hands of someone who needs it.
donate.shipping_body: We arrange pickup through a courier (FedEx or similar, depending on your location), nationally and internationally, at no cost to you. If the number of instruments to donate is large, we collect them in person.

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.subtitle: Join us at events celebrating Panamanian music.
events.no_events: No upcoming events. Follow us on social media to stay updated!

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Moments that inspire us to keep going.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are in Panama and always ready to hear from you.

past_events.title: Past Events
past_events.subtitle: Moments that have shaped our story.

calipso.title: Tribute to Calypso
calipso.subtitle: Exhibition on the Law declaring October 17 of each year as the Day of Panamanian Calypso and Calypsonians
calipso.book_caption: The Calypso, Yesterday, Today and Tomorrow — Gerardo Maloney Francis and Ian Isidore Smart
